_meta.name: real_curated
_meta.labeler: claude (opus-4.8), reading each session's production session_text + window_titles, judged against the live open pm_tasks board
_meta.method: Hand-labeled REAL app_sessions rows (stable PK ids in meridian.db). Each session is judged against the SAME candidate set: the current open pm_tasks board. A session is 'task' ONLY if its own evidence clearly matches one open ticket's scope; real work with no matching open ticket (incl. work on a NON-board ticket or a DIFFERENT project) is 'untracked'; idle/personal/settings is 'overhead'. The build step (build_real_goldens.py) rebuilds the exact classifier prompt from the live row + board, so inputs never rot (unlike the frame-id-anchored real_2026-05-28.json, whose screenpipe frame ids were renumbered on a re-sync and no longer address matching content).
_meta.focus: Discriminate untracked-vs-task: the set is deliberately weighted toward non-task (24 non-task / 6 task) and seeds 5 hard decoys where the model is tempted to force a task.
_meta.candidate_board_note: Candidate tickets = whatever pm_tasks rows are open (is_terminal=0) at build time. The labels below assume the KAN board snapshot where KAN-231 (audit/improve task-classification) and KAN-239 (pass daily plan to classifier) are open, and KAN-240 / KAN-203 / KAN-86 / BANUI-* are NOT open candidates.

labels.reasoning: Claude Code transcript: user asks to rewrite the whole session-task-classification prompt + pipeline to improve accuracy and cut cost. Directly matches KAN-231 'Audit task-classification accuracy and improve it'.
labels.design_note: Clean task anchor. Model assigned KAN-239 (daily-plan) — a wrong-key false match this golden catches.

labels.reasoning: Claude Code: raising a PR from the classifier-prompt-rewrite branch to main; assesses working tree of the rewrite work. Continuation of the KAN-231 classifier-accuracy work.
labels.design_note: Task via continuity+branch context; PR mechanics alone are thin, so medium confidence.

labels.reasoning: VS Code editing CHANGELOG.md + llm_selector.py, searching the classifier model label (Qwen3.5-9B-OptiQ-4bit) — fixing which model serves the classifier. Improving the classifier = KAN-231.
labels.design_note: Task. Could also read as KAN-109 (LLM benchmarking); KAN-231 is the closer scope.

labels.reasoning: VS Code editing services/agents/_system_context.py (the classifier SYSTEM prompt) with test_prompt_cache_equivalence.py output in the terminal. Editing the classifier prompt = KAN-231.
labels.design_note: Clean task. The edited file literally is the classifier system prompt.

labels.reasoning: VS Code editing _system_context.py 'CURRENT CAPABILITY - session classification' section. Same classifier-prompt work as 34410 = KAN-231.
labels.design_note: Model called this UNTRACKED (false negative) — this golden catches the model under-linking real classifier work.

labels.reasoning: Chrome on the OpenObserve 'Session->Task Classifier — Debug' dashboard, scrolling the live classification table (task_key/type/confidence per session). Auditing classifier output = KAN-231.
labels.design_note: Model said task KAN-239 with hallucinated reasoning ('editing run_watcher.py KAN-86') — right that it's a task, wrong key + fabricated evidence.

labels.reasoning: Claude Code debugging why screenpipe/meridian a11y permission toggles don't appear after install (macOS TCC). Real work, but no open ticket covers install/permission UX.
labels.design_note: Clean untracked: genuine engineering, no candidate match.

labels.reasoning: Claude Code researching how Claude Code can visually test the UI it writes (Playwright MCP, Chrome DevTools MCP). Personal tooling research, not Meridian ticket work.
labels.design_note: Untracked tooling research.

labels.reasoning: Claude Code checking which Meridian services are running (ps for meridian/screenpipe/mlx) — ops/diagnostic troubleshooting, no specific ticket.
labels.design_note: Untracked devops. Borderline overhead; kept untracked as it is active diagnosis. (Model errored: truncated JSON.)

labels.reasoning: Terminal showing TCC permission-reset instructions (tccutil reset ScreenCapture, meridian restart) — install/permissions troubleshooting, no open ticket.
labels.design_note: Untracked infra/troubleshooting.

labels.reasoning: Terminal: identical dev-server startup (uvicorn + cargo-watch). Devops setup, no board ticket.
labels.design_note: Model assigned task KAN-240 (non-board). Untracked.

labels.reasoning: Claude Code building the drag-and-drop 'Today's plan' PAGE (PlanView.tsx, polling/data-refresh). KAN-239's scope is PASSING the confirmed plan to the classifier (backend boost), not building the plan UI. No open ticket covers building the plan page -> untracked.

labels.reasoning: DBeaver browsing many tables incl. daily_plan/daily_plan_meta/pm_worklog* plus frames/app_sessions/etl_cursor. Broad DB inspection, not focused work on one ticket.

labels.reasoning: Claude desktop app brainstorming Meridian product architecture; sidebar lists 'DeepEval design philosophy', 'UAT roadmap' etc. Generic architecture chat, not scoped to an open ticket.
